name: code.md_report
description: Format a statistics dict into a structured Markdown sales report with title, summary table, and narrative section.

stats.description: Per-column stats dict as produced by code.csv_stats.

code:
import json, sys
args = json.load(sys.stdin)
stats = args.get('stats', {})
row_count = args.get('row_count', 0)
lines = ['# Sales Report', '', f'**Total Records Analyzed:** {row_count}', '', '## Column Statistics', '']
num_cols = {c: s for c, s in stats.items() if 'mean' in s}
str_cols = {c: s for c, s in stats.items() if 'type' in s}
if num_cols:
    lines.append('| Column | Count | Mean | Min | Max | Total |')
    lines.append('|--------|------:|-----:|----:|----:|------:|')
    for col, s in sorted(num_cols.items()):
        lines.append(f'| {col} | {s["count"]} | {s["mean"]} | {s["min"]} | {s["max"]} | {s["total"]} |')
    lines.append('')
if str_cols:
    lines.append('## Categorical Columns')
    lines.append('')
    lines.append('| Column | Unique Values |')
    lines.append('|--------|-------------:|')
    for col, s in sorted(str_cols.items()):
        lines.append(f'| {col} | {s["unique"]} |')
    lines.append('')
lines.extend(['## Summary', '', f'This report covers {row_count} sales records across {len(stats)} column(s). ' + (f'Numeric columns: {list(num_cols.keys())}. ' if num_cols else '') + (f'Categorical columns: {list(str_cols.keys())}.' if str_cols else '')])
markdown = '\n'.join(lines)
print(json.dumps({'ok': True, 'data': {'markdown': markdown}}))
